headline: Retail earnings & consumer check-in: Dollar General, Dick's
summary: Dollar General (DG) beat fourth quarter estimates on both the top and bottom lines. The company's forecast was in line with analyst expectations. Dick's Sporting Goods (DKS) also beat fourth quarter estimates but issued weak profit guidance, as the company's Foot Locker acquisition weighs on the company's bottom line. Loop Capital Markets managing director and consumer sector head Anthony Chukumba joins Market Catalysts host Julie Hyman to discuss the two earnings prints in the context of broader consumer health. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Catalysts.

content.title: Retail earnings & consumer check-in: Dollar General, Dick's
content.description:
Dollar General (DG) beat fourth quarter estimates on both the top and bottom lines. The company's forecast was in line with analyst expectations.

Dick's Sporting Goods (DKS) also beat fourth quarter estimates but issued weak profit guidance, as the company's Foot Locker acquisition weighs on the company's bottom line.

Loop Capital Markets managing director and consumer sector head Anthony Chukumba joins Market Catalysts host Julie Hyman to discuss the two earnings prints in the context of broader consumer health.

To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Catalysts.

headline: Ulta: Fiscal Q4 Earnings Snapshot
summary: The average estimate of 14 analysts surveyed by Zacks Investment Research was also for earnings of $8.01 per share. The beauty products retailer posted revenue of $3.9 billion in the period, exceeding Street forecasts. Eleven analysts surveyed by Zacks expected $3.81 billion.

content.title: Ulta: Fiscal Q4 Earnings Snapshot
content.summary: The average estimate of 14 analysts surveyed by Zacks Investment Research was also for earnings of $8.01 per share. The beauty products retailer posted revenue of $3.9 billion in the period, exceeding Street forecasts. Eleven analysts surveyed by Zacks expected $3.81 billion.

headline: Ulta Beauty shares fall after annual profit outlook miss
summary: Investing.com -- Ulta Beauty shares fell about 8% in extended trading on Thursday after the cosmetics retailer issued earnings guidance that came in slightly below Wall Street expectations, despite reporting stronger-than-expected fourth-quarter results.

headline: Ulta’s (NASDAQ:ULTA) Q4 CY2025: Beats On Revenue But Stock Drops
summary: Beauty, cosmetics, and personal care retailer Ulta Beauty (NASDAQ:ULTA) announced better-than-expected revenue in Q4 CY2025, with sales up 11.8% year on year to $3.90 billion. Its GAAP profit of $8.01 per share was in line with analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Ulta Beauty (ULTA) Q4 2025 Earnings Transcript
summary: Kecia L. Steelman: Thank you, Kiley, and good afternoon, everyone.  As I reflect in the past twelve months, I am incredibly proud of the Ulta Beauty, Inc. team and all we have accomplished.  Today, I will start by briefly highlighting our fourth quarter and holiday performance and then discuss our full-year performance and the progress we made against our Ulta Beauty unleashed strategy before sharing more details on our plans and priorities for fiscal 2026.

content.title: Ulta Beauty (ULTA) Q4 2025 Earnings Transcript
content.summary: Kecia L. Steelman: Thank you, Kiley, and good afternoon, everyone.  As I reflect in the past twelve months, I am incredibly proud of the Ulta Beauty, Inc. team and all we have accomplished.  Today, I will start by briefly highlighting our fourth quarter and holiday performance and then discuss our full-year performance and the progress we made against our Ulta Beauty unleashed strategy before sharing more details on our plans and priorities for fiscal 2026.

headline: Ulta Beauty Bets On Rare Beauty And Luna Bronze For Growth
summary: Ulta Beauty launched an exclusive rollout of Rare Beauty across its stores and online, reporting record first day sales. The company also entered its first major U.S. partnership with sunless tanning brand Luna Bronze, expanding its self tanning assortment. Both brand partnerships are intended to broaden Ulta's product offering and draw new customers beyond typical seasonal promotions. For investors watching NasdaqGS:ULTA, these product launches come as the stock trades around $624.7, with...

headline: Ulta Beauty tumbles on annual outlook; analyst says buy the dip
summary: Investing.com -- Ulta Beauty shares fell more than 8% in premarket trading Friday after the cosmetics retailer issued softer-than-expected guidance, while reporting stronger-than-expected fourth-quarter results.
